mode_policy.title: Testnet Rehearsal
mode_policy.purpose: Exercise real exchange workflows on Binance Spot Testnet with zero-risk balances and exchange-side order routing.
mode_policy.primary_goal: Validate execution timing, order placement, and operational safety on real exchange plumbing.
mode_policy.guardrail: Do not use live-account wealth to justify testnet trades; testnet is rehearsal, not wealth generation.

paper.title: Paper Practice
paper.purpose: Rehearse strategy logic with simulated capital and internal fills before touching any exchange account.
paper.primary_goal: Improve timing, coin selection, and process quality without financial risk.
paper.guardrail: Do not treat paper gains as proof of live readiness or as spendable capital.

testnet.title: Testnet Rehearsal
testnet.purpose: Exercise real exchange workflows on Binance Spot Testnet with zero-risk balances and exchange-side order routing.
testnet.primary_goal: Validate execution timing, order placement, and operational safety on real exchange plumbing.
testnet.guardrail: Do not use live-account wealth to justify testnet trades; testnet is rehearsal, not wealth generation.

live.title: Live Capital
live.purpose: Trade the real Binance account where every order affects actual holdings and account growth.
live.primary_goal: Grow and protect real capital with disciplined timing, symbol selection, and risk control.
live.guardrail: Capital preservation outranks experimentation; only high-conviction, fully-audited trades belong here.
